Fulfilled by TikTok (FBT) is TikTok Shop's warehouse and shipping program. In 2026, base fulfillment starts at $3.58 per unit, storage is free for 60 days, and the breakeven depends on weight, return rate, and sell-through. FBT stands for Fulfilled by TikTok — TikTok Shop's in-house fulfillment service where TikTok warehouses, picks, packs, and ships products on behalf of sellers. The three options are: FBT (TikTok warehouses your inventory), Upgraded TikTok Shipping (you ship with TikTok labels), or Collections by TikTok (TikTok picks up from your warehouse for 50+ orders/day). FBT fulfillment gives sellers a \"Free 3-Day Delivery\" badge on product listings, which boosts visibility in TikTok Shop search and can increase conversion rates by 15-25% according to TikTok's own data.","score":0.8506799,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=3507056320268087&lang=en","title":"FBT Rate Card & Frequently Asked Questions","content":"The FBT rate card adds several **2025–2026 fee and policy updates**: all FBT orders get **free shipping by default** from **June 16, 2025** unless sellers **opt out** via the provided link; fulfillment fees drop for many **16–50 lb single-unit** items from **May 20, 2026**, but **5–20 lb multi-unit** fees rise from **June 18, 2026**. It also updates **chargeable weight rules**, lowers some **storage fees**, introduces **itemized return fees**, new **incident/VAS fees**, and increases the **SIOC discount**. **Expanding Fulfillment fees rate card to support items up to 150 lb effective July 13, 2026. ### **New hub placement fee update**. ### **New FBT customer return handling fees effective June 1, 2026. ### **New Fulfillment Fee changes starting May 20, 2026 and June 18, 2026. ### **Updated Chargeable Weight Rules Effective May 1, 2026, for less or equal 2lb products refer to section C.**. ### **Multi-unit Pricing Update****:** **Starting from January 12, 2026, new multi-unit pricing will be effective.","score":0.78886026,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.dashboardly.io/post/tiktok-shop-fees-2026-the-complete-seller-fee-guide","title":"TikTok Shop Fees 2026: Every Fee + What You Actually Keep","content":"# TikTok Shop Fees 2026: Every Fee + What You Actually Keep. **TikTok Shop charges sellers a 6% referral fee on most categories in 2026, plus a 1.02%–3.78% payment processing fee — bringing the true marketplace take-rate to approximately 7.02% before fulfillment and creator commissions.**. TikTok Shop's 2026 fee structure is deceptively simple on the surface — a flat 6% referral fee sounds competitive — but the real cost of selling on the platform is built from a stack of logistics mandates, creator commissions, settlement delays, and reverse logistics charges that most sellers never fully model. This guide breaks down exactly what TikTok Shop seller fees look like in 2026 — from the referral fee formula to the logistics mandate that ended independent shipping — so you can calculate your true profit with confidence. As we navigate 2026, TikTok Shop has matured from an experimental social feature into a **$112.2 billion global commerce powerhouse**. In 2026, the #1 cause of account deactivation on TikTok Shop is **overselling**.","score":0.76659125,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=3267224767891214&lang=en","title":"2026 FBT April to September Incentive Program","content":"# 2026 FBT April to September Incentive Program. **FBT sellers can earn a 10% fulfillment-fee reimbursement** on monthly **incremental delivered units** from **April–September 2026** if they **register** and exceed their **February 2026 baseline by at least 600 units**. The rebate applies only to eligible FBT fulfillment fees, is **capped at $1/unit** and **600,000 units/shop/month**, calculated separately by shop, with no cross-month carryover. * The core structure of this Incentive Program is as follows: using the seller’s delivered FBT units in February 2026 as the baseline, if the seller’s delivered FBT units in any calendar month from April through September 2026 increase by 600 units or more compared with the baseline, the seller will be eligible to receive a reimbursement equal to 10% of the FBT fulfillment fees for the eligible incremental units in that calendar month, capped at USD $1.00 per unit.","score":0.7587435,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.0,"request_id":"6fa64c1a-b3c8-4acf-a4c3-58b7ea568c6c"}
